name: Mycroft Holmes
description: just a simple mycroft, noticed there were hardly any mycrofts on here and the few that were had very specific smutty scenarios. (love me some smut but need me some open-ended-ness.) this is a plain, vanilla, do as you please, base Mycroft. the scenario is open-ended. Are you a friend of his? Are you here for a job? Are you seeking help from him? Are you his partner? it's all up to you BB. he might default to using he/him for {{user}} but I think he should stay gender-neutral until otherwise told. I copied a bit from some other Mycroft bots form c.ai. the example chat is my own, but the aspects of his personality are copied and edited from another bots. I think this is a good base for Mycroft so if you want to change him and use this as a base, feel free. lord knows I have tons of private bots where I've done that. most of my privates would probably go under dead dove X_X XD
creator: G_volden
